body:
The IT Service Centre provides support and problem resolution for all HMRC IT and telephony services and systems. 

To resolve the issue yourself online see  IT, Phones and Data - index on the intranet where help and guidance is available on how to solve common problems, plus answers to frequently asked questions, and much more. 

Alternatively: 

Contact the IT Service Centre by telephone: Search for: IT service centre

Prior to contacting the Service Centre, please have the following information available.  

  • Your computer name and asset tag – see how to find these 

  • Any error messages on your screen 

  • Whether any colleagues are having the same problem 

  • Whether the problem is intermittent or continuous 

Helpdesk advisers can fix many problems immediately but if they need to investigate your issue further or refer it to a specialist team, it will take longer.

For an update on a previously reported IT incident, you should go to My active items in Service Central.

 If you’re unhappy with how we've handled your issue, you can escalate your Incident or log a complaint
title: Manage work: customer service: IT service centre (Internal Use)
